speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need everyone to roll initiative. Technically you guys don't hear anything, so we'll see when it comes around your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a success. You take half damage. You only take 12 points of poison damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. Jester, you see the shape and you glance over and you can see with your darkvision this ten-foot-long leopard-like cat that is currently now pressed onto the chest and body of Caduceus. It bites down towards him and all these strange protrusions from around the shoulders and head area all strike down, as a few of them curl back and look at you and in that bit, you can see a few beats of light, faint bits of starlight and moon that are coming down and reflecting in the eyes of these snake heads. And you hear this (growling) up behind you on the ruin where you were just standing. I'll be right back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How far away are you guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if we're very far. I don't think we're very far away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They went to do a perimeter sweep.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Find out about these beasts on D&D Beyond!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit! That means there's probably more than two?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caduceus, you are over here. Jester, you are here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now the rest of you are over-- so Jamedi's over here in his tent. The rest of you are all clustered inside the hut. Caduceus--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, it's so scary! It's a leopard with snake heads!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's someone who was drunk at night and was like, "Let's just do this thing!"
